description: Phase 11 T7: 650M e2e on M3 Pro with ESM_APPLE_AMX=on (fp16 BNNSGraph contexts loaded from weights/esm2_650m.amx-fp16/). Uniform 8x256, esm-cpp-int8 base + 199 AMX contexts loaded via Model::LoadAmxArtifacts.
note: Speedup is real (~2.23x HF vs 1.79x P10) but below the linchpin's 2x-on-fc1 projection. The spike's microbench timing overstated the SDOT-vs-AMX ratio; the real per-call delta in the integrated forward is ~1.5x on the GEMM bucket. The bias is baked into each fp16 mlmodelc, so LinearProj's AMX branch skips the bias add.
